name: Speech House & Cyril Hart Arboretum
highlights: Central Dean classic — Cyril Hart's arboretum of exotic conifers and Verderers' court house.
points_of_interest: Speech House (Verderers' Court, 1676); Cyril Hart Arboretum; New Fancy viewpoint
viewpoints: New Fancy spoil-heap viewpoint over central Dean
parking_start: Speech House Arboretum car park (free, Forestry England)
food_drink_nearby: Speech House Hotel; The Rising Sun Moseley Green
hazards_notes: Forest tracks muddy in winter; wild boar active at dusk
